spacing: Generous scaling, p-6 or p-8 for containers with borders. p-12 for section gaps. Dense grid for KPI and matrices with gap-4 or gap-6.

layout_strategy.admin: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Visible skeleton, border-collapse styles. Tabular data uses monospace. Sharp edges.
layout_strategy.kiosk: Massive touch targets, asymmetrical bento blocks. High contrast. Tetris grid for actions.

surface_styles.admin_cards: Flat background, 1px solid border (#E0DDD5), no shadow. Hover: slight lift, subtle shadow, border darkens.
surface_styles.kiosk_buttons: Solid Electric Blaze or Ink Black, sharp corners, tactile feedback. Hover: background becomes lighter hue.

motion.hover: transition: transform 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease
motion.kiosk_tap: Scale down slightly on active/press. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary

icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a technical, duotone look.

components.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Distinct hover states with high contrast text. Only primary color for main CTAs.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Sharp borders, high contrast focus rings.
components.tables: Dense, monospace for numbers, left-align standard data, right-align financials.
components.pills: Status pills use bright colors with high contrast text (e.g. bg-error text-white).

images.description: Textile factory workers sewing, used as the background for the Admin Vault login to establish industrial context.
Worker operating sewing machine, used for Worker Terminal login to give a grounded, authentic feel.
Close up of sewing machine, perfect for empty states or generic textured backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build 'StitchLog Suite v5 (Bayne Edition)' as a factory floor production logging system.

Implement a clear two-mode UI: Light Mode for Admin Vault (tactile, technical, off-white #F4F3EF base) and Dark Mode for Worker Terminal (high-contrast, #0D0D0D base). Explicitly avoid the generic dark slate/emerald SaaS look.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, and IBM Plex Mono for tables/logs/kiosk inputs. Install @fontsource packages or load via Google Fonts.
Do not use Shadcn Card components natively if they enforce roundness and soft shadows. Override them to use custom flat surfaces with 1px borders (Grid Borders style) for the Admin.
CRITICAL: Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
Implement pure localStorage functionality for the 5 requested keys (no backend).
Kiosk flow: PIN pad login, cascading Product->Batch dropdowns, 4 category tabs, HH:MM dual-select time picker, active job card workspace.
Admin flow: 4 KPI tiles, Personnel matrix with inline edit, Production batch master, Holiday manager, Financial Reports with CSV export.
Apply strict contrast rules, especially for Worker Terminal readability.
